text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I did it! I won first place!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
W-wait! Does that mean I'm in the winner's
circle?!
choice_data_list: Of course you are! You came in first!
Of course you are! You came in first!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Did you see me, Trainer?! Did you see me cross
the finish line first?!
choice_data_list: I sure did! You were incredible!
I sure did! You were incredible!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I just took off running, and there was no
one in front of me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Did you know the wind is super strong at the
front? I didn't!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: And the winner's circle is so green! A little rough, too...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Getting first felt sooo good! It was super-duper
fun and amazing!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Trainer! I wanna get first place again and again!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'm gonna win again for sure!
